summary: A Go-based modular monolith providing test runners, MCP integrations, Goss migration tooling, and monorepo management capabilities.
patterns: Test-driven development with extensive test files
concerns: Duplicate internal/baseline directory structure across GOrchestra and root
Archived agent artifacts (GOrchestra/glm-agents/0005) still present in tree
Uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged) at time of analysis
Heavy reliance on auto-committed session metadata may clutter history
suggestions: Clean up archived GLM agent directories to reduce repository bloat
Resolve duplicate baseline paths between root and GOrchestra subdirectory
Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean working tree
Consolidate runner test files (assertion_test, runner_test, runner_extra_test) if they overlap
